# Advertising Sri Lanka

> Sri Lanka's #1 advertising information hub. Plain-language guides, service pages and contact options for every type of advertising in Sri Lanka — ATL, BTL, digital, SEO, social media, outdoor, branding, web, video, and event management.

- Site: https://advertisingsrilanka.lk
- Phone: 0701772626 (+94 70 177 2626)
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/94701772626
- Location: Colombo, Sri Lanka
- Languages: English, Sinhala, Tamil
- Service area: All of Sri Lanka (Colombo, Kandy, Galle, Jaffna, Negombo, Kurunegala, Anuradhapura)

## Core pages

- [Home](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/): Overview of every advertising option in Sri Lanka.
- [All Services](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/services): Searchable directory of services.
- [About](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/about): Who we are.
- [Contact](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/contact): Get in touch.
- [Get a Free Quote](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/get-quote): Request pricing.
- [Advertising Packages](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/advertising-packages): Bundled offers.
- [Advertising Rates](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/advertising-rates): Indicative pricing.
- [Case Studies](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/case-studies): Past work.

## Service categories

- [ATL Advertising](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/atl-advertising-sri-lanka): TV, radio, newspaper, magazine, cinema, media buying, media planning.
- [BTL Advertising](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/btl-advertising-sri-lanka): Brand activation, sampling, in-store, mall and field marketing.
- [Digital Marketing](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/digital-marketing-sri-lanka): Performance marketing, lead generation, PPC.
- [SEO Services](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/seo-services-sri-lanka): On-page, off-page, technical, local and ecommerce SEO.
- [Social Media Marketing](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/social-media-marketing-sri-lanka): Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube.
- [Outdoor Advertising](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/outdoor-advertising-sri-lanka): Billboards, hoardings, transit, LED screens.
- [Branding](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/branding-sri-lanka): Logo, identity, packaging, corporate and retail branding.
- [Event Management](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/event-management-sri-lanka): Corporate events, weddings, exhibitions, conferences, stage setup, LED screen rental.
- [Web Design & Development](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/web-design-sri-lanka): Websites, ecommerce, landing pages, UI/UX.
- [Video Production](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/video-production-sri-lanka): TVCs, corporate, promo, drone and motion graphics.
- [Email & SMS Marketing](https://advertisingsrilanka.lk/email-sms-marketing-sri-lanka): Bulk email/SMS, automation, newsletters.
